Portfolio.title: Portfolio Exhibit
Portfolio.description: A 3D cube portfolio exhibition layout and face config details

id.description: The unique ID of the exhibition

userId.description: The unique Firebase UID of the creator

ownerEmail.description: The email address of the creator

description.description: The descriptive text for the exhibition

accentColor.description: The current color theme applied to the exhibition spaces

theme.description: Visual environment mode: light or dark setting

showGridLines.description: Toggle grid styling on background and text frames

cubeGlow.description: Whether the 3D rotating display cube features emission glowing outlines

layoutMode.description: Exhibition frame mode: split, bento, or brutalist layout

faces.description: Array of 6 faces configured for the 3D display cube

socials.description: Social media handles of the artist/creator

/portfolios/{portfolioId}.description: Collection hosting saved and shared 3D exhibitions mapped under secure author IDs
